# L01 Long Business Meeting Plan

## Target

- Duration: 45–55 minutes
- Speakers: Priya, Jordan, Alex, Morgan
- Natural speech speed
- Facts distributed across the beginning, middle, and end
- Final recap repeats existing facts only

## Sections

1. Pilot scope and customer audience
2. Recording-duration policy
3. Pricing and commercial approval
4. Security and access review
5. Data retention and deletion
6. Processing quality and regression testing
7. Customer onboarding and support
8. Single sign-on and regional storage questions
9. Long-recording cost and reliability
10. Final decisions, actions, risks, and open-question recap

## Required content

- 8 confirmed decisions
- 10 actions
- 6 named actions
- 2 named actions without deadlines
- 2 unassigned actions
- 6 risks
- 4 unresolved questions
- 4 rejected proposals
- No new facts in the final recap
